title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER CANBY MEDICAL AND DENTAL CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 227 NW 3rd Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm, Tuesday 8am-noon and 1pm-6pm, Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 416-4547 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 416-4547 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, and other intrepretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Marion Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Canby Area Transit (CAT) for the 3X Canby Bus, Route 99X Bus, City Circulator, and Molalla to Canby Bus. Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - GENERAL DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER CANBY MEDICAL AND DENTAL CLINIC
